name: GLADSTONE COMMERCIAL CORP
business: Gladstone Commercial Corp is an externally-advised REIT that focuses on acquiring, owning, and managing primarily industrial and office properties. It leases properties to tenants under net leases with terms of approximately seven to 20 years, where tenants pay most operating costs. The company targets secondary growth markets and has a portfolio diversified across 27 states as of February 18, 2026.
sellsTo: Private and public companies across various business sectors

exposures.sentence: We focus on acquiring, owning, and managing primarily industrial and office properties.
We focus on acquiring, owning, and managing primarily industrial and office properties.

catalysts.event: Sale of a portion of a land parcel in Ocala, Florida
catalysts.sentence: On January 12, 2026, we sold a portion of a land parcel at one of our Ocala, Florida properties for $2.0 million.
